summary: Frontend-only testing of reworked Dashboard (User/Owner toggle) and 10 new sub-pages. Verified all 19 dashboard tiles are present, correctly labeled and navigate to the expected /app/* routes; owner earnings box navigates to /app/earnings. Verified primary interactions on every new page (unsave, redeem, referral copy/share, accept/decline requests, calendar day toggle, SOS, earnings withdraw, reviews reply) and confirmed regression pages (home, rent-bike, book-ride, list-bike, share-ride) still load. All tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Data is purely client-side (localStorage) as per spec. Some pages (SavedBikes) had a slow networkidle probably from image loading — non-blocking but could impact perceived performance on slower connections.
test_credentials: Mock auth; /dashboard and /app/* directly reachable without login.
seed_data_creation: None (all data seeded from lib/data.js and localStorage).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified 41 dashboard nav assertions + 17 page-interaction assertions all pass. Dashboard testids used: dash-view-rider, dash-view-owner, dash-tile-<kebab-label>, owner-earnings-box, user-dashboard, owner-dashboard. Sub-page testids used: unsave-<id>, redeem-200, referral-copy, referral-share, accept-req1, reject-req*, cal-day-<n>, sos-btn, earnings-withdraw. Regression on 4 core flows + home still OK.
